version.description: The version of the config file format

project.description: The name of the project being benchmarked.

project_url.description: The URL to the homepage of the project.

repo.description: The URL or local path of the source code repository for the project being benchmarked.

repo_subdir.description: The relative path to your Python project inside the repository. This is where its setup.py file is located.

build_command.description:
Customizable commands for building the project.
https://asv.readthedocs.io/en/latest/asv.conf.json.html#build-command-install-command-uninstall-command

install_command.description:
Customizable commands for installing the project.
https://asv.readthedocs.io/en/latest/asv.conf.json.html#build-command-install-command-uninstall-command

uninstall_command.description:
Customizable commands for uninstalling the project.
https://asv.readthedocs.io/en/latest/asv.conf.json.html#build-command-install-command-uninstall-command

branches.description:
List of branches to benchmark.
If not provided, defaults to 'main' (for git) or 'default' (for mercurial).

dvcs.description: The DVCS being used. If not set, it will be automatically determined from 'repo'.

environment_type.description: The tool to use to create environments.

pythons.description:
The versions of Python to run the benchmarks in.
https://asv.readthedocs.io/en/stable/asv.conf.json.html#pythons

matrix.description:
The matrix of dependencies and environment variables to run the benchmarks with.
https://asv.readthedocs.io/en/stable/asv.conf.json.html#matrix

env.description: Matrix of environment variables to pass to build and benchmark commands.

env_nobuild.description: Matrix of environment variables to pass to benchmark commands, but not trigger new builds.

exclude.description: Combinations to be excluded from the set to test.

include.description: Additional environment combinations to be included.

benchmark_dir.description: The directory that benchmarks are stored in.

env_dir.description: The directory to cache the Python environments in.

results_dir.description: The directory that raw benchmark results are stored in.

html_dir.description: The directory that the html tree should be written to.

show_commit_url.description: The base URL to show a commit for the project.

hash_length.description: The number of characters to retain in the commit hashes.

install_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for installing any dependencies in environment.

default_benchmark_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for all benchmarks.

build_cache_size.description: The number of builds to keep, per environment.

wheel_cache_size.description: The number of builds to keep, per environment.

plugins.description: A list of modules to import containing asv plugins.

conda_channels.description: The list of conda channel names to be searched for benchmark dependency packages.

conda_environment_file.description:
A conda environment file that is used for environment creation.
https://asv.readthedocs.io/en/stable/asv.conf.json.html#conda-environment-file

regressions_first_commits.description: The commits after which the regression search should start looking for regressions.

regressions_thresholds.description: The thresholds for relative change in results, after which asv publish starts reporting regressions.
